section.heading: Environmental protection, safety, and health requirements

content.p: The Administrator shall ensure that the Administration complies with all applicable environmental, safety, and health statutes and substantive requirements.
The Administrator shall develop procedures for meeting such requirements.
Nothing in this chapter shall diminish the authority of the Secretary of Energy to ascertain and ensure that such compliance occurs.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 106–65, div. C, title XXXII, § 3261, Oct. 5, 1999, 113 Stat. 967.)

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in subsec. (c), was in the original “this title”, meaning title XXXII of div. C of Pub. L. 106–65, Oct. 5, 1999, 113 Stat. 953, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title XXXII to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 2401 of this title and Tables.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Mar. 1, 2000, see section 3299 of Pub. L. 106–65, set out as a note under section 2401 of this title.
